en: It was now two days before the Passover and the Feast of Unleavened Bread. And the chief priests and the scribes were seeking how to arrest him by stealth and kill him,
zh: 過兩天，就是逾越節和除酵節了，祭司長和經學家設法怎樣用詭計逮捕耶穌，把他殺害。

en: for they said, "Not during the feast, lest there be an uproar from the people."
zh: 不過他們說：“不可在節期下手，免得引起民眾暴動。”

en: And while he was at Bethany in the house of Simon the leper, as he was reclining at table, a woman came with an alabaster flask of ointment of pure nard, very costly, and she broke the flask and poured it over his head.
zh: 耶穌在伯大尼，在患痲風的西門家裡吃飯的時候，有一個女人來了，拿著一瓶珍貴的純哪噠香膏。她打破了瓶，把香膏澆在耶穌的頭上。

en: There were some who said to themselves indignantly, "Why was the ointment wasted like that?
zh: 有幾個人很生氣，彼此說：“為甚麼這樣浪費香膏呢？

en: For this ointment could have been sold for more than three hundred denarii and given to the poor." And they scolded her.
zh: 這香膏可以賣三百多個銀幣，用來賙濟窮人。”他們就向她發怒。

en: But Jesus said, "Leave her alone. Why do you trouble her? She has done a beautiful thing to me.
zh: 但耶穌說：“由她吧！為甚麼難為她呢？她在我身上作的是一件美事。

en: For you always have the poor with you, and whenever you want, you can do good for them. But you will not always have me.
zh: 你們常常有窮人跟你們在一起，只要你們願意，隨時都可以向他們行善，然而你們卻不常有我。

en: She has done what she could; she has anointed my body beforehand for burial.
zh: 她已經盡她所能的作了。她預先用香膏膏了我的身體，是為了我的安葬。

en: And truly, I say to you, wherever the gospel is proclaimed in the whole world, what she has done will be told in memory of her."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，福音無論傳到世界上甚麼地方，都要傳講這女人所作的來記念她。”

en: Then Judas Iscariot, who was one of the twelve, went to the chief priests in order to betray him to them.
zh: 十二門徒中的一個，就是加略人猶大，去見祭司長，要把耶穌交給他們。

en: And when they heard it, they were glad and promised to give him money. And he sought an opportunity to betray him.
zh: 他們聽見了就很歡喜，答應給他銀子。於是猶大就找機會出賣耶穌。

en: And on the first day of Unleavened Bread, when they sacrificed the Passover lamb, his disciples said to him, "Where will you have us go and prepare for you to eat the Passover?"
zh: 除酵節的第一天，就是宰殺逾越節羊羔的那一天，門徒問耶穌：“你要我們到哪裡去，為你預備逾越節的晚餐呢？”

en: And he sent two of his disciples and said to them, "Go into the city, and a man carrying a jar of water will meet you. Follow him,
zh: 他就差派兩個門徒，對他們說：“你們到城裡去，必有一個拿著水瓶的人，向你們迎面而來，你們就跟著他，

en: and wherever he enters, say to the master of the house, 'The Teacher says, Where is my guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?'
zh: 無論他進入哪一家，你們要對那家主說，老師說：‘我的客廳在哪裡？我和門徒好在那裡吃逾越節的晚餐。’

en: And he will show you a large upper room furnished and ready; there prepare for us."
zh: 他必指給你們樓上一間布置整齊、預備妥當的大房間，你們就在那裡為我們預備。”

en: And the disciples set out and went to the city and found it just as he had told them, and they prepared the Passover.
zh: 門徒出去，進了城，所遇見的正如耶穌所說的，就預備好了逾越節的晚餐。

en: And when it was evening, he came with the twelve.
zh: 到了晚上，耶穌和十二門徒來了。

en: And as they were reclining at table and eating, Jesus said, "Truly, I say to you, one of you will betray me, one who is eating with me."
zh: 他們坐著吃飯的時候，耶穌說：“我實在告訴你們，你們中間有一個跟我一起吃飯的人要出賣我。”

en: They began to be sorrowful and to say to him one after another, "Is it I?"
zh: 他們就很憂愁，一個一個地問他：“是我嗎？”

en: He said to them, "It is one of the twelve, one who is dipping bread into the dish with me.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“他是十二門徒裡的一個，和我一同把手蘸在盤子裡的。

en: For the Son of Man goes as it is written of him, but woe to that man by whom the Son of Man is betrayed! It would have been better for that man if he had not been born."
zh: 正如經上指著人子所說的，他固然要離世，但出賣人子的那人有禍了！他沒有生下來還好。”

en: And as they were eating, he took bread, and after blessing it broke it and gave it to them, and said, "Take; this is my body."
zh: 他們吃的時候，耶穌拿起餅來，祝謝了，就擘開，遞給門徒，說：“你們拿去吃吧，這是我的身體。”

en: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he gave it to them, and they all drank of it.
zh: 又拿起杯來，祝謝了就遞給門徒，他們都喝了。

en: And he said to them, "This is my blood of the covenant, which is poured out for many.
zh: 耶穌說：“這是我的血，是為立約的，為許多人流出來的。

en: Truly, I say to you, I will not drink again of the fruit of the vine until that day when I drink it new in the kingdom of God."
zh: 我實在告訴你們，我決不再喝這葡萄酒，直到我在 神的國裡喝新酒的那一天。”

en: And when they had sung a hymn, they went out to the Mount of Olives.
zh: 他們唱完了詩，就出來，往橄欖山去。

en: And Jesus said to them, "You will all fall away, for it is written, 'I will strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered.'
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“你們都要後退，因為經上記著： ‘我要擊打牧人， 羊群就分散了。’

en: But after I am raised up, I will go before you to Galilee."
zh: 但我復活以後，要比你們先到加利利去。”

en: Peter said to him, "Even though they all fall away, I will not."
zh: 彼得對他說：“就算所有的人都後退，我卻不會。”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Truly, I tell you, this very night, before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“我實在告訴你，就在今天晚上，雞叫兩遍以前，你會三次不認我。”

en: But he said emphatically, "If I must die with you, I will not deny you." And they all said the same.
zh: 彼得更堅決地說：“就算必須與你一同死，我也決不會不認你！”眾人也都這樣說。

en: And they went to a place called Gethsemane. And he said to his disciples, "Sit here while I pray."
zh: 他們來到一個地方，名叫客西馬尼；耶穌對門徒說：“你們坐在這裡，我去禱告。”

en: And he took with him Peter and James and John, and began to be greatly distressed and troubled.
zh: 他帶了彼得、雅各、約翰一起去，就驚懼起來，非常難過。

en: And he said to them, "My soul is very sorrowful, even to death. Remain here and watch."
zh: 於是對他們說：“我的心靈痛苦得快要死了；你們要留在這裡，也要警醒。”

en: And going a little farther, he fell on the ground and prayed that, if it were possible, the hour might pass from him.
zh: 耶穌稍往前走，俯伏在地上禱告：如果可能的話，使那時刻不要臨到他。

en: And he said, "Abba, Father, all things are possible for you. Remove this cup from me. Yet not what I will, but what you will."
zh: 他說：“阿爸、父啊，你凡事都能作，求你叫這杯離開我。但不要照我的意思，只要照你的旨意。”

en: And he came and found them sleeping, and he said to Peter, "Simon, are you asleep? Could you not watch one hour?
zh: 耶穌回來，看見門徒睡著了，就對彼得說：“西門，你睡覺嗎？你連一個小時也不能警醒嗎？

en: Watch and pray that you may not enter into temptation. The spirit indeed is willing, but the flesh is weak."
zh: 應當警醒、禱告，免得陷入試探；你們心靈雖然願意，肉體卻是軟弱的。”

en: And again he went away and prayed, saying the same words.
zh: 耶穌又去禱告，說的也是同樣的話。

en: And again he came and found them sleeping, for their eyes were very heavy, and they did not know what to answer him.
zh: 他再回來的時候，看見門徒睡著了；因為他們十分疲倦，不知道該怎樣回答他。

en: And he came the third time and said to them, "Are you still sleeping and taking your rest? It is enough; the hour has come. The Son of Man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
zh: 耶穌第三次回來，對他們說：“你們還在睡覺休息嗎？夠了，時候到了，看哪，人子要被交在罪人手裡了。

en: Rise, let us be going; see, my betrayer is at hand."
zh: 起來，我們走吧！出賣我的人來了。”

en: And immediately, while he was still speaking, Judas came, one of the twelve, and with him a crowd with swords and clubs, from the chief priests and the scribes and the elders.
zh: 耶穌還在說話的時候，十二門徒中的猶大和一群拿著刀棒的人來到了；他們是祭司長、經學家和長老派來的。

en: Now the betrayer had given them a sign, saying, "The one I will kiss is the man. Seize him and lead him away under guard."
zh: 出賣耶穌的人給他們一個暗號，說：“我跟誰親吻，誰就是他。你們把他逮捕，小心帶去。”

en: And when he came, he went up to him at once and said, "Rabbi!" And he kissed him.
zh: 猶大來到，立刻上前對耶穌說：“拉比！”就跟他親吻。

en: And they laid hands on him and seized him.
zh: 他們就動手拿住耶穌，逮捕了他。

en: But one of those who stood by drew his sword and struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his ear.
zh: 站在旁邊的人中有一個拔出刀來，砍了大祭司的僕人一刀，削掉了他的一隻耳朵。

en: And Jesus said to them, "Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs to capture me?
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“你們帶著刀棒出來，把我當作強盜捉拿嗎？

en: Day after day I was with you in the temple teaching, and you did not seize me. But let the Scriptures be fulfilled."
zh: 我天天在殿裡教導人，跟你們在一起，你們卻沒有捉拿我；但這是為了要應驗經上的話。”

en: And they all left him and fled.
zh: 門徒都離開他逃跑了。

en: And a young man followed him, with nothing but a linen cloth about his body. And they seized him,
zh: 有一個青年，赤身披著一塊麻布，跟著耶穌。眾人捉住他的時候，

en: but he left the linen cloth and ran away naked.
zh: 他就丟掉麻布，赤身逃跑了。

en: And they led Jesus to the high priest. And all the chief priests and the elders and the scribes came together.
zh: 他們把耶穌押到大祭司那裡，所有的祭司長、長老和經學家都聚集在一起。

en: And Peter had followed him at a distance, right into the courtyard of the high priest. And he was sitting with the guards and warming himself at the fire.
zh: 彼得遠遠地跟著耶穌，直到大祭司的官邸，和差役一同坐著烤火。

en: Now the chief priests and the whole Council were seeking testimony against Jesus to put him to death, but they found none.
zh: 祭司長和公議會全體都尋找證據控告耶穌，要把他處死，卻沒有找著。

en: For many bore false witness against him, but their testimony did not agree.
zh: 有許多人作假證供控告他，但他們的證供各不相符。

en: And some stood up and bore false witness against him, saying,
zh: 有幾個人站起來，作假證供控告他說：

en: "We heard him say, 'I will destroy this temple that is made with hands, and in three days I will build another, not made with hands.'"
zh: “我們聽他說過：‘我要拆毀這座人手所造的聖所，三日之內要另建一座不是人手所造的聖所。’”

en: Yet even about this their testimony did not agree.
zh: 就是這樣的見證，他們也不一致。

en: And the high priest stood up in the midst and asked Jesus, "Have you no answer to make? What is it that these men testify against you?"
zh: 大祭司站起來，走到中間，問耶穌：“這些人作證控告你的是甚麼呢？你怎麼不回答呢？”

en: But he remained silent and made no answer. Again the high priest asked him, "Are you the Christ, the Son of the Blessed?"
zh: 耶穌卻不作聲，甚麼也不回答。大祭司又問他：“你是那受稱頌者的兒子基督嗎？”

en: And Jesus said, "I am, and you will see the Son of Man seated at the right hand of Power, and coming with the clouds of heaven."
zh: 耶穌說：“我是。你們要看見人子，坐在權能者的右邊，駕著天上的雲降臨。”

en: And the high priest tore his garments and said, "What further witnesses do we need?
zh: 大祭司就撕開自己的衣服，說：“我們還要甚麼證人呢？

en: You have heard his blasphemy. What is your decision?" And they all condemned him as deserving death.
zh: 你們都聽見這褻瀆的話了。你們認為怎麼樣？”眾人都定他該死的罪。

en: And some began to spit on him and to cover his face and to strike him, saying to him, "Prophesy!" And the guards received him with blows.
zh: 於是有些人就向他吐唾沫，蒙住他的臉。用拳頭打他，對他說：“你說預言吧！”差役把他拉去，用手掌打他。

en: And as Peter was below in the courtyard, one of the servant girls of the high priest came,
zh: 彼得在下邊院子的時候，大祭司的一個婢女來了，

en: and seeing Peter warming himself, she looked at him and said, "You also were with the Nazarene, Jesus."
zh: 看見彼得烤火，就瞪著他說：“你也是和拿撒勒人耶穌一夥的！”

en: But he denied it, saying, "I neither know nor understand what you mean." And he went out into the gateway and the rooster crowed.
zh: 彼得卻否認說：“我不知道，也不明白你在說甚麼！”他就走出去，到了前院，雞就叫了 。

en: And the servant girl saw him and began again to say to the bystanders, "This man is one of them."
zh: 那婢女看見他，又對站在旁邊的人說：“這個人也是他們一夥的。”

en: But again he denied it. And after a little while the bystanders again said to Peter, "Certainly you are one of them, for you are a Galilean."
zh: 彼得還是不承認。過了一會，站在旁邊的人也對彼得說：“你真是他們一夥的，因為你也是加利利人。”

en: But he began to invoke a curse on himself and to swear, "I do not know this man of whom you speak."
zh: 彼得就發咒起誓說：“我不認得你們說的這個人！”

en: And immediately the rooster crowed a second time. And Peter remembered how Jesus had said to him, "Before the rooster crows twice, you will deny me three times." And he broke down and wept.
zh: 立刻雞就叫了第二遍。彼得想起耶穌對他說過的話：“雞叫兩遍以前，你要三次不認我。”他一想起來，就哭了 。
